## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? One paragraph max. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat:` — new feature
- [ ] `fix:` — bug fix
- [ ] `refactor:` — no behaviour change
- [ ] `docs:` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore:` — build, CI, dependency updates

## Test plan

<!-- How was this tested? List the steps. -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] `terraform validate` passes for infra changes
- [ ] Tested locally / on dev branch

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows `type: short description` (e.g. `feat: add list-resources tool`)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the diff
- [ ] CLAUDE.md requirements followed
